name: io.github.tcconnally/perseus
title: Perseus — Live Context Engine
description: Compile-before-context engine for AI assistants. Pre-resolves your entire workspace state (git, services, memory, team coordination) into a single markdown briefing before the assistant sees it. Exposes 13 directive tools: query, services, memory, skills, waypoint, session, agora, inbox, read, env, health, agent, date. Deterministic, cacheable, and assistant-agnostic. Multi-agent coordination with zero-collision concurrent writes, federated memory, and crash recovery.

tools.name: perseus_query
tools.description: Execute a shell command inside the workspace and return its stdout. Respects Perseus path guards and trust boundaries.

tools.name: perseus_services
tools.description: Run the configured service health checks and return a table of results.

tools.name: perseus_memory
tools.description: Query Perseus's narrative project memory (Mnēmē). Optionally federated across subscribed workspaces.

tools.name: perseus_skills
tools.description: List available agent skills from the configured skill library.

tools.name: perseus_waypoint
tools.description: Return the latest session checkpoint so an agent can resume where it left off. Includes task, status, and next steps.

tools.name: perseus_session
tools.description: Return digests of recent Perseus sessions.

tools.name: perseus_agora
tools.description: Query the Agora task board — list tasks, optionally filtered by status.

tools.name: perseus_inbox
tools.description: Read agent inbox messages (point-to-point inter-agent communication).

tools.name: perseus_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a file within the workspace. Respects Perseus path guards.

tools.name: perseus_env
tools.description: Read the value of an environment variable (with fallback).

tools.name: perseus_health
tools.description: Run Daedalus context-maintenance heuristics and return a report of stale or decaying context.

tools.name: perseus_agent
tools.description: Execute a Perseus @agent subprocess and return its output. Short-lived agent that completes a single task.

tools.name: perseus_date
tools.description: Return the current date and time in the configured format.
